Note: One of the most replicated miRNA-target interactions in the literature; strong multi-study evidence across multiple cell types
Pathway-level association via NF-κB/IL-6 signalling; no direct 3'UTR validation found in retrieved literature [INDIRECT — not experimentally validated in this cell type]

No direct 3'UTR luciferase validation found in literature for this interaction in microglia or related cell types. Previously cited sources (Zhou et al. 2022; Wang et al. 2019) validate miR-222-3p→TIMP3 and prognostic associations respectively — not direct PTEN 3'UTR binding.
